_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Problem management involves anticipating and identifying problems in systems, processes or services, and ensuring appropriate solutions are implemented.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including defining the prediction target, identifying appropriate inputs, and establishing measurable success criteria.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.459), DQ-T-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.490). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, identifying, problems]. DDaT-only terms [anticipating, ensuring, implemented, involves, management, problem] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, criteria, defining, establishing, formulating, inputs] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.873, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.9%). "Problem management involves anticipating and identifying problems in systems, pr" and "Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including d" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.485 ≈ STS 0.490 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [appropriate, identifying, problems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.2%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, identifying, problems]. DDaT-only: [anticipating, ensuring, implemented, involves, management, problem]. WIDAI-only: [business, criteria, defining, establishing, formulating, inputs].
